title: Business Registration (Sole Proprietorship)
description: Register a business name for a sole proprietorship at the Divisional Secretariat under the Registration of Business Names Act.
department: Divisional Secretariat / Registrar of Business Names

offices.name: Your Divisional Secretariat
offices.address: Nearest DS to your business address

documents_required: Business name registration application form (from DS)
steps: Choose a business name and verify it is not already registered
Collect registration form from Divisional Secretariat
Submit within statutory period after commencing trade
Pay fee at DS cashier
Collect Business Registration Certificate

fees.registration: As per DS schedule — confirm at local Divisional Secretariat

processing_time: Same day to a few working days
tips: Banks require business registration certificate to open business accounts
Register at the DS covering your business address
common_mistakes: Using a name too similar to an existing registered business
Starting trade before checking name availability

title: Land / Property Title Registration
description: Register or transfer land and property title at the Land Registry.
documents_required: Original title deed or prior registration documents
steps: Engage a notary to prepare transfer deed
Pay stamp duty at designated bank
Submit at relevant Land Registry
Registry verifies title chain
Collect registered title upon approval

fees.registration: Stamp duty + registration fees — vary by property value

tips: Always verify title chain with a lawyer before purchasing
Survey plan must match physical boundaries
common_mistakes: Missing stamp duty payment before submission
Name spelling mismatch between deed and NIC

title: Income Tax / TIN Registration
description: Obtain a Tax Identification Number (TIN) from the Inland Revenue Department. Required for tax filing and many financial transactions.

offices.name: IRD Head Office — Taxpayer Service Unit
offices.address: 1st Floor South Wing, Sir Chittampalam A. Gardiner Mawatha, Colombo 02

documents_required: Completed taxpayer registration form (individual/company as applicable)
steps: Register online at eservices.ird.gov.lk → Taxpayer Registration (free)
Or submit physical form to Taxpayer Service Unit, Colombo 02 or regional office (Mon–Fri 8:30–16:15)
Receive TIN and request PIN for e-filing
File annual returns by IRD deadline
Keep records for 6 years

fees.late_filing_penalty: Varies — penalties apply for late returns

processing_time: TIN: same day to few days online
tips: TIN registration is free via eservices.ird.gov.lk
All individuals 18+ should register for TIN per current IRD policy
Request PIN after TIN to use e-filing services
common_mistakes: Using outdated irdezfile URL — primary portal is eservices.ird.gov.lk
Not registering TIN when starting self-employment

title: Aswesuma Welfare Benefits
description: Social welfare cash transfers for eligible low-income households under the Aswesuma programme administered by the Welfare Benefits Board.
documents_required: Active bank account for benefit transfer
steps: Check eligibility and beneficiary lists at wbb.gov.lk
Apply or appeal during announced registration/appeal windows
GN/field officer verifies household (may include home visit)
Submit forms to Divisional Secretariat if required
Await SMS/notification of approval and payment schedule
processing_time: Varies by phase and verification cycle
tips: Appeals submitted via wbb.gov.lk during open windows
Ensure mobile number on application is correct and active
common_mistakes: Missing appeal deadline when name not on eligible list
Inactive mobile number blocking IWMS login for appeals

title: Pvt Ltd Company Registration (eROC)
description: Incorporate a private limited company online through the eROC portal.

offices.name: Registrar of Companies
offices.address: Level 12, West Tower, World Trade Center, Colombo 01

documents_required: NIC/passport copies of directors and shareholders
steps: Reserve name on eroc.drc.gov.lk (LKR 2,000 + VAT)
Prepare Articles of Association (typically via company secretary)
Submit incorporation documents online with fees
ROC issues Certificate of Incorporation
Register TIN and EPF within statutory deadlines
tips: Certified company secretary required for Pvt Ltd
All fees subject to VAT — see drc.gov.lk fee table
Register TIN at eservices.ird.gov.lk immediately after incorporation
common_mistakes: Name reservation expiring before full submission

title: Traffic Fine Payment (GovPay)
description: Pay police traffic spot fines instantly via mobile banking through GovPay — available island-wide.

offices.name: Any police station island-wide
offices.address: Pay on-the-spot via banking app after receiving fine sheet

documents_required: Traffic fine sheet with reference number
Police station and officer mobile as stated on fine sheet
steps: Receive spot fine slip from traffic officer
Open bank or fintech app → Bill Payments → Government Payments → GovPay
Select Sri Lanka Police → Traffic Fine
Enter fine sheet number, vehicle no., licence no., station, and offence types
Confirm payment — officer receives SMS confirmation and returns licence

fees.fine_amount: As stated on spot fine slip

tips: Nationwide rollout completed February 2026 — all provinces covered
No separate GovPay app — use your existing bank/fintech app
Also payable via Dialog eZ Cash agents island-wide
common_mistakes: Wrong fine reference number in banking app
Selecting wrong police station or offence type from dropdown
